The Advanced student is able to:
  • Write the equation for a transformed parent function given the graph or verbal description of the transformations. OR
  • Write a description of the transformations using function notation given a verbal description of the transformations of f(x) or the original f(x) graph and its transformed graph. OR
  • Generalize effects of a transformation on domains and ranges, including effects on ordered pairs, when exploring all of the different types of transformations in multiple representations of f(x).
